content: RFC 1950 specifies the zlib wrapper (CMF/FLG, DEFLATE payload, Adler-32) and requires compliant decompressors to validate CMF, FLG, Adler-32, and inappropriate preset dictionaries. RFC 1951 describes DEFLATE fixed and dynamic Huffman blocks, back references limited to the emitted output, and a 32 KiB maximum distance. These allow portable bounded implementation when output/work/input ceilings are checked before allocation and emission.
